snippet.title: Subhath Sanjula - Shaheena (ෂහීනා) | Blind Auditions | The Voice Sri Lanka
snippet.description:
The Voice Sri Lanka

The Voice One of the most successful reality TV formats in the world. Extremely successful in 180 countries. 
SRI LANKA’S NEWEST TELEVISION EXPERIENCE - The Voice Sri Lanka

The Voice is an international reality television singing competition franchise of Dutch origin. It is based on the reality singing competition The Voice of Holland, which was originally created by Dutch television producer John de Mol. The show's format features five stages of competition: producers' auditions, blind auditions, battle rounds, knockouts (since 2012), and live performance shows.

A combined 438 singers have won The Voice, The Voice Kids, The Voice Teens and The Voice Senior in 145 countries/regions. Each winner is given a recording contract, a monetary prize, and a title as that nation's "Voice". 

Official Facebook Page - https://www.facebook.com/TheVoiceSriLankaOfficial
Official Instagram - https://www.instagram.com/thevoicesrilanka
Subscribe Sirasa TV on Youtube : https://bit.ly/3sCpWEz

#TheVoiceSL #SirasaTV #TheVoiceSriLanka #TheVoiceSL #TheVoiceLK #VoiceSriLanka #VoiceLK #lka

වේල්ල වීදිය ප්‍රදේශයේ දී ට්‍රැවලින් බෑගයක දමා තිබියදී සොයාගත් හිස නොමැති කාන්තා මළ සිරුර සම්බන්ධයෙන් පොලිස් විමර්ශනවලට අවශ්‍යව සිටි සැකකාර උප පොලිස් පරීක්ෂකවරයාගේ මළ සිරුර පළමුවෙන් ම දැක ඇති පුද්ගලයා “අද දෙරණ“ ට ඒ බව අනාවරණය කළේය.

snippet.title: Randu Kekka (රණ්ඩු කෙක්ක​) - Oshada Akash (Official Music Video)
snippet.description:
Randu Kekka (රණ්ඩු කෙක්ක​) - Oshada Akash (Official Music Video)

♪Stream the Full Song Here♪
iTunes: https://music.apple.com/lk/album/randu-kekka-single/1554254827
Spotify: https://open.spotify.com/album/0Y6auZvOwCS5gGPDmBHLlP
Deezer: https://www.deezer.com/en/album/208947122
Yandex Music: https://music.yandex.com/album/13951995/track/78197046
Amazon Prime Music: SOON
Hungama: SOON

Song Lyrics: 
ඉස්මතු වෙන්නේ ඔයා ගැනයි
තාම හිත පතුලේ
විස්තර හෙව්වේ පුරුද්දටයි
ඒක වරද මගේ
සම්බන්දේ අපි අතරේ නැතුවත් යලි ඇරඹෙන්නේ 
අමතක වෙන්නැති අතීතේ මට විතරද වද දෙන්නේ 

රණ්ඩු කෙක්ක මාත් එක්ක
හේතු හොය හොය පැටලිච්ච
කාලෙ රැක්ක පෙමත් එක්ක
හීන අඬනව පැරදිච්ච

හැමදාමත් මහ රෑ - මා ඇහැරූ ඇමතුමක්
ඒ කාලේ ලැබුණා - හිත පුරවා සැනසුමක්
නොහිතූ තැනක තියා - හැමදේටම නැවතුමක්
ඔබ ඇයි ගියේ කියා - තව මට නෑ තේරුමක්

යන්නට හිතුන නිසා - නැති වරදක් පැවරුවත්
ඔය හිත රවට්ටනා - එක වෙන්නෑ පහසුවක්
කිව්වට නෙවෙයි කියා - මා ඔබගේ කවුරුවත්
දන්නෝ දනී ඉතින් - එය නම් මහ රැවටුමක්

තාම හිත පතුලේ
විස්තර හෙව්වේ පුරුද්දටයි

රණ්ඩු කෙක්ක මාත් එක්ක
හේතු හොය හොය පැටලිච්ච
කාලෙ රැක්ක පෙමත් එක්ක
හීන අඬනව පැරදිච්ච

snippet.description:
Latest romantic music video "#KalayakThiyewi" sung by singer -  #NalindaRanasinghe .
The Video is Directed By Thiwanka Mihiran, Lyrics by ' Prasanna Kumara Dammalage ' & Music by ' Hashan Thilina '.

Dial Now...

☎Dialog -  875282946
☎Mobitel - 74740786
☎Hutch - 369415681
☎Airtel - 8880087616

▶Song Name : Kalayak Thiyewi(Sithuwillak)
▶Artist : #NalindaRanasinghe
▶Lyrics : Prasanna Kumara Dammalage
▶Music : Hashan Thilina
▶Video Director : Thiwanka Mihiran
▶Production: Evoke Music

කාලයක් තියේවී මා මතක්වෙන
එපා කියා ගිය ඔබට
ආයෙමත් නො ඒවී ඒ අතීතය
අපේ ලොවේ අපි ගෙවුව
සැමදා ඔබ මගේ කියා හිතුව
හිතට රිද්දනා නිතර
දඬුවමක් වුණා ආදරේ
සිතුවිල්ලක් ගානේ ඔබමයි උන්නේ සෑමදා හිතේ
සැනසිල්ලක් නෑ මේ ලෝකේ තිබුණේ මට ඔයා වගේ
දවසත් ගෙවුණේ පාළුවේ
ඇස නොගැටී ඔය රූපේ
කිසිමදාක ඔබ ගාවින් හිත නෑ දුර ගියේ
දහසක් දේ කිවු හාදුවේ
තව සුවඳයි ඒ මතකේ
ළඟින් ඉන්න මා පැතුවත් හැමදා ජීවිතේ
නොසිතුදාක නැවතීමක් තැබුණා ආදරේ
පවසන්නට බොහො දේ හිතේ
තිබුණත් ඔබ නෑසූවේ
මුණගැහීම වැරදීමක් කියලා ඒ අපේ
අවසන් දා තෙක් හුස්ම මේ
ඉමු කීවත් එක වාගේ
සෑමදේම රැවටීමක් වීලා ඒ ඔබේ
නොසිතුදාක නැවතීමක් තැබුණා ආදරේ

▶ Evoke Music
Enjoy & stay connected with us for more Videos!!!
👉Subscribe Evoke Music: http://goo.gl/MQ9Sbs
👉Like us on Facebook : https://bit.ly/EvokeMusic_FB
👉Follow us on Instagram: https://bit.ly/EvokeMusic_IG

Song Lyrics:
ඉන්න ලඟ ආසයි
එන්න හිත පාලුයි
නින්ද නැති පාටයි
මතක ඔය දෑසයි
අල්ලගෙන අත්වැල්
නඟමු අපි හසරැල්
මැණික නුඹ එනකල්
මඟ බලමි හැමකල්

කලු කොණ්ඩේ සුදු පිච්චෙන්
මල් මාලයක් ගවසාලා
නැලවිල්ලේ ඉඟ පද්දන්
ඇස් මායමින් පුරවාලා
පා සියුම් තාලයකට තියලා
ඈ හෙමින් ඈතින් එනු දැකලා
පාලුවෙන් සේදුනු හදවත මා
ආදරෙන් ඒ මොහොතෙම පිරුණා
හිතම සැනසිල්ලේ  ඔබ නිසා කෙල්ලේ

පොද වැස්සේ අත් අල්ලන්
ඔබ හා තෙමෙන්නට ඕනේ
හිත අස්සේ පෙම ඉල්ලන්
මගෙමයි කියන්නට ඕනේ
ආදරෙන් වෑහුනු හැන්ඳෑවේ
රෝස මල් හීනෙක ඔබ ආවේ
මේ යොවුන් ජීවිතයට මාගේ
වාසනාවත් අරගෙන වාගේ
හිතම සැනසිල්ලේ  ඔබ නිසා කෙල්ලේ

පාලුවෙන් සේදුනු හදවත මා
ආදරෙන් ඒ මොහොතෙම පිරුණා
හිතම සැනසිල්ලේ  ඔබ නිසා කෙල්ලේ

පොද වැස්සේ අත් අල්ලන්
ඔබ හා තෙමෙන්නට ඕනේ
හිත අස්සේ පෙම ඉල්ලන්
මගෙමයි කියන්නට ඕනේ
ආදරෙන් වෑහුනු හැන්ඳෑවේ
රෝස මල් හීනෙක ඔබ ආවේ
මේ යොවුන් ජීවිතයට මාගේ
වාසනාවත් අරගෙන වාගේ
හිතම සැනසිල්ලේ  ඔබ නිසා කෙල්ලේ

snippet.title: දිනූෂ නිතරම කන නදුනිගෙ පරිප්පුව |  Dinusha Dissanayake & Naduni Karunathilake | Music Pickle
snippet.description:
Music Pickle මේ සතියේ program එක හැඩ කරන්න අපි එකතු කරගත්තේ ඔයාලා ගොඩාක් ආදරේ කරන ගායන ක්ෂේත්‍රයේ වගේම රංගන ක්ෂේත්‍රයේත් දක්ෂතා දක්වන ආදරණීය couple එකක්. ඒ වෙන කවුරුත් නෙවෙයි Dream star ඔස්සේ ක්ෂේත්‍රයට පැමිණි දිනූෂ දිසානායක සහ නිරූපන ශිල්පිණියක් මෙන්ම රංගන ශිල්පිණියක් ද වන නදුනි කරුණාතිලකයි. බොහෝ ජනප්‍රිය වූ TV Derana ඔස්සේ විකාශය වූ "පාවෙලා වලාකුලේ ඒවිද අම්මා" ටෙලිනාට්‍යයේ වගේම සැබෑ ජීවිතයේදීත් දිනූෂ සහ නදුනි Husband & Wife නිසා ඔවුන්ගේ කැදැල්ලේ රසවත් තොරතුරු ගොන්නක් Music Pickle අපිත් එක්ක share කළා. මේ ඔවුන් දෙදෙනාගේ පළමු Youtube program එක නිසාම ඔවුන් ඒ අත්දැකීම හරිම සතුටෙන් විදගත් අයුරු බලන්න එකතු වෙන්න Music Pickle සමගින්.

Production Manager : Samith Roshan
Producer : Dilini Madusanka Perera
Assistant Producer : Charitha Gangewaththa
Director of Photography : Dammika Dissanayake
Camera Operators : Amayuru Withanage | Shiran Wimukthi | Akila Heshan
Editor : Dasun Prabhashwara
Head of Post Production : Vishwa Abhishek 
Guitarist : Mahesh Dissanayake
Special Thanks : Nisanka Weheraduwa

Subscribe us : https://bit.ly/3hemfOs
Like us on Facebook : https://www.facebook.com/MusicPickle/

snippet.title: ගෝඨාට ඉල්ලා අස්වෙන්නැයි බලකරමින් කාදිනල් මැල්කම් රන්ජිත් මාරාන්තික උපවාසයකට
snippet.description:
https://lrnews.ch/
https://www.facebook.com/d.m.thushara.jayarathna.3
Im D.M. Thushara Jayarathna and studied at Ananda Sastralaya, Kotte. Im working as an Investigative Web Journalist For my higher studies, I joined with Sabaragamuwa University, Management Faculty as a management student and after that I joined to Sri Lanka Law College as a Law student. I have won the Gold medal addressing Juri competition and as well as I was the Captain of Law College Debating Team. 
 
I'm the one who made complain against Mr. Namal Rajapaksha, son of former president Mr. Mahinda Rajapaksha regarding cheating the Law College Examination. After that incident, I faced political problems and life threats. Due to this reason, In the year of 2012 I left my country and currently I'm living in Switzealand. 
 
 
I dedicated my life to establish Democracy and Rule of Law of my country.

snippet.title: Julius Mitchell - A Change is Gonna Come|  Blind Auditions | The Voice Sri Lanka
snippet.description:
The Voice Sri Lanka

The Voice One of the most successful reality TV formats in the world. Extremely successful in 180 countries. 
SRI LANKA’S NEWEST TELEVISION EXPERIENCE - The Voice Sri Lanka

The Voice is an international reality television singing competition franchise of Dutch origin. It is based on the reality singing competition The Voice of Holland, which was originally created by Dutch television producer John de Mol. The show's format features five stages of competition: producers' auditions, blind auditions, battle rounds, knockouts (since 2012), and live performance shows.

A combined 438 singers have won The Voice, The Voice Kids, The Voice Teens and The Voice Senior in 145 countries/regions. Each winner is given a recording contract, a monetary prize, and a title as that nation's "Voice". 

Official Facebook Page - https://www.facebook.com/TheVoiceSriLankaOfficial
Official Instagram - https://www.instagram.com/thevoicesrilanka
Subscribe Sirasa TV on Youtube : https://bit.ly/3sCpWEz

Podu t̶h̶a̶g̶i̶d̶a̶ ̶t̶h̶a̶g̶i̶d̶a̶ Rakita Rakita. 

Catch Dhanush as Suruli in Jagame Thandhiram, coming soon to Netflix. 

Netflix Presents “Jagame Thandhiram”
A YNOT Studios & Reliance Entertainment Production. 
A Suruli 2019 Film Limited Production.

Starring Dhanush, James Cosmo, Aishwarya Lekshmi, Kalaiyarasan, Joju George and others.

Written & Directed by Karthik Subbaraj

Produced by S. Sashikanth
Co-Produced by Chakravarthy Ramachandra

Music - Santhosh Narayanan
DOP - Shreyaas Krishna
Art Directors - T. Santanam, Vinoth Rajkumar (UK)
Editor - Vivek Harshan
Lyrics : Vivek, Poetu Dhanush, Arivu, Anthony Dasan & Madurai Babaraj
Stunts - Dinesh Subbarayan
Choreography - M Sherif, Baba Baskar
Line Producers - Muthuramalingam, Sudipto Sarkar (UK)
Production Executive - Rangaraj
Sound Design - Kunal Rajan
Sound Mix - M R Rajakrishnan
Costume Design - Praveen Raja 
Chief Make-Up Artist - A Sabari Girison
Costumer - Subier
DI & VFX - Accel Media
DI Colorist - Suresh Ravi
Publicity Design - Tuney John (24AM)
Publicity Stills - V S Anandhakrishna
Stills - Murugan
PRO - Nikkil

YNOT - Head of Distribution - Kishore Tallur
YNOT - Head of Operations - Pranav Rajkumar

Direction Team - Bala, Purushoth, Bharath, Dhakshi, Karthik, Shylam, Vigneswaran, Jagadish, Somitharan, Praveen, Srinivasan & Suresh

♬♬ Music On - Sony Music Entertainment

Follow Netflix India on:
Website: https://www.netflix.com/
YouTube: http://bit.ly/NetflixIndiaYT
Instagram: http://www.instagram.com/netflix_in
Facebook: http://www.facebook.com/NetflixIN
Twitter: http://twitter.com/netflixindia

#JagameThandhiramOnNetflix #Dhanush #NetflixIndia

snippet.title: හිස කදෙන් වෙන් කර තරුණිය ඝා@තනය කල SI නිලධාරියා දිවි නහගන්න කලින් බිරිදට ලියපු "සම්පූර්ණ ලිපිය"
snippet.description:
"SI අංකල් කිය කියා මගේ පස්සෙන් ආවා.ඉල්ලපු හැමදේම දුන්නා පස්සේ ඔයාටයි ලමයින්ටයි බනින්න ගත්තා..මට එපාම වුනා
ඒක් මගේ වරද..ප්ලෑන් කරලා කරපු දෙයක් නෙවෙයි ඇත්තටම එහෙම නොවෙන්න තිබුනානම් හොදයි කියලා දැන් හිතෙනවා.."
රටම කම්පාකරමින් හිස කදෙන් වෙන් කර තරුණිය ඝාතනය කල  නිලධාරියා දිවි නහගන්න කලින් බිරිදට ලියපු සම්පූර්ණ ලිපිය මෙන්න.News

snippet.title: Karnan | Kandaa Vara Sollunga Lyric Video Song | Dhanush | Mari Selvaraj | Santhosh Narayanan
snippet.description:
#Karnan | #KandaaVaraSollunga Lyric Video Song | #Dhanush | #MariSelvaraj | #SanthoshNarayanan | #KalaipuliSThanu | #VCreations

Song: Kandaa Vara Sollunga
Vocals: Kidakkuzhi Mariyammal, Santhosh Narayanan
Lyrics: Mari Selvaraj
Composed by Santhosh Narayanan

Special thanks to Thekkambatti S Sundarrajan, Ramji Audios - Madurai
Recorded by Santhosh Narayanan, Sai Shravanam, R K Sundar
Recording Assistants : Pranav Muniraj, NSR Sukumar
Recorded at Future Tense Studios, Prism Sound Studios, Resound India
Tapes: ‘4 Idiots’ group
Pappambadi Periya Melam Jama Munusami Kuzhu
Arranged, Programmed by Santhosh Narayanan
‘Geoshred’ Sarangi: Navneeth Sundar
Mixed and Mastered by Sai Shravanam at Future Tense Studios
Musicians Coordinator: Meenakshi Santhosh
Karnan Chants Chorus : Arivu, Yogi Sekar, Kottur Victor, Kalyanaraman, Purushothaman,
Pranav Muniraj, Deva A, ‘Pei’ Vijay S, Sathya Thamizharasan, Karthik Raja Karuppusamy

#Karnan Tamil Movie:
Star Cast : Dhanush , Lal , Yogi Babu , Nataraj (Natty ), Rajisha Vijayan
Director : Mari Selvaraj
Music Composer: Santhosh Narayanan
Producer: Kalaipuli S Thanu
Banner: V Creations
Director Of Photography: Theni Eshwar
Editor: Selva RK
Art Director : Tha Ramalingam
Action Choreography: Dhilip Subbarayan 
Dance Choreography: Sandy
Sound Design : Suren G – S Alagiakoothan
DI Colorist : Prasad and Babu
DI Line Producer: Krishna Rao V
Stills: Amir
Make up : Nellai V Shanmugam – R Raja
Costume : Perumal Selvam
Publicity Design : Kabilan Chellaih
Production Executive: Venkat Arumugam
PRO: Riaz K Ahmed – Diamond Babu

Lyrics animated by - SFTS MEDIA

Lyrics:

Not fathered by the Sun God; 
Nor witnessed by the Moon God; 
Born to a forsaken woman, this child - 
Fed and raised on famine, this child...

(Chorus)
Have you seen Karnan? Do tell him to come! 
Oh, fetch Karnan right away!
Have you seen Karnan? Do tell him to come! 
Oh, fetch Karnan right away!

There's the big old Banyan Tree;
Perched upon its tallest branch, 
Though it is all alone -
The lone parakeet sings his name!

(Chorus)
Have you seen Karnan? Do tell him to come! 
Oh, fetch Karnan right away!
Have you seen Karnan? Do tell him to come! 
Oh, fetch Karnan right away!

All these countless temples in the village, 
All these countless Gods in the temple, 
And not a single idol of Karnan - 
But he's part of our family! 

(Chorus)
Have you seen Karnan? Do tell him to come! 
Oh, fetch Karnan right away!
Have you seen Karnan? Do tell him to come! 
Oh, fetch Karnan right away!

Never laid eyes on any armour (Kavacham);
Never adorned with any ornaments (Kundalam), either;
Would you look how he wields the sword! 
None of his foes survived.

(Chorus)
Have you seen Karnan? Do tell him to come! 
Oh, fetch Karnan right away!
Have you seen Karnan? Do tell him to come! 
Oh, fetch Karnan right away!

Audio Label: Think Music

© 2021 SPI Music Pvt. Ltd.

For All Latest Updates:
Subscribe to us on: http://www.youtube.com/thinkmusicindia
Subscribe to us on: http://www.dailymotion.com/thinkmusicindia

snippet.title: Kasun,Pasindu & Lakindu - Kampa Nowan Mahamaya (මහාමායා) | Blind Auditions | The Voice Sri Lanka
snippet.description:
The Voice Sri Lanka

The Voice One of the most successful reality TV formats in the world. Extremely successful in 180 countries. 
SRI LANKA’S NEWEST TELEVISION EXPERIENCE - The Voice Sri Lanka

The Voice is an international reality television singing competition franchise of Dutch origin. It is based on the reality singing competition The Voice of Holland, which was originally created by Dutch television producer John de Mol. The show's format features five stages of competition: producers' auditions, blind auditions, battle rounds, knockouts (since 2012), and live performance shows.

A combined 438 singers have won The Voice, The Voice Kids, The Voice Teens and The Voice Senior in 145 countries/regions. Each winner is given a recording contract, a monetary prize, and a title as that nation's "Voice". 

Official Facebook Page - https://www.facebook.com/TheVoiceSriLankaOfficial
Official Instagram - https://www.instagram.com/thevoicesrilanka
Subscribe Sirasa TV on Youtube : https://bit.ly/3sCpWEz

#TheVoiceSL #SirasaTV #TheVoiceSriLanka #TheVoiceSL #TheVoiceLK #VoiceSriLanka #VoiceLK #lka

snippet.title: Soorarai Pottru - Deleted Scene 01 - Maara All Lost | Sudha Kongara | Suriya | 2D Entertainment
snippet.description:
Get a glimpse of Surya’s  “Soorarai Pottru” deleted scene 01. Amazon’s original movie Surya’s “Soorarai Pottru” is about Maara (Surya), a boy from a remote village dreaming of having his airline service.

Find out the challenges he has to face in this journey to see his dream come true. 2D Entertainment presents a deleted scene as a part of a 100th-day promotion that you shouldn’t miss.

Watch the full movie now. Also, to watch more deleted scenes from the action-drama, subscribe to 2D Entertainment.

snippet.title: CHAKRA - Tamil Sneak Peek | Vishal | Shraddha Srinath | Yuvan Shankar Raja | VFF
snippet.description:
Presenting the Tamil Sneak Peek  of CHAKRA; starring Vishal; Directed by M.S. Anandan; Music Composed by Yuvan Shankar Raja.

Vishal starrer "Chakra" is an action-thriller movie releasing on 19th February.

MS Anandan's debut film stars Vishal, Shraddha Srinath and Regina Cassandra. 'Chakra' talks about cybercrime and online scams. 

Vishal, as Chandru, is an officer who is on a mission to expose this evil act.

Here's a Tamil sneak peek on the VFF channel that you shouldn't miss! Subscribe to Vishal Film Factory for more updates. 

Chakra movie is coming soon!

Checkout The Trailer in Other Languages👇
Telugu Trailer ▶ https://youtu.be/N8B3chilPxI
Malayalam Trailer ▶ https://youtu.be/S9Q3qfIuehU
Kannada Trailer ▶ https://youtu.be/GhAe_8rykbg

#Chakra #ChakraTrailer #WelcomeToDigitalINDIA #Vishal #YuvanShankarRaja #ShraddhaSrinath #ReginaCassandra #MSAnandan #VFF

Starring : Vishal, Shraddha Srinath, Regina Cassandra, Robo Shankar, K.R.Vijaya, Srushti Dange, Manobala

Written And Directed by : M.S. Anandan 
Producer : Vishal 
Cinematography : Balasubramaniem 
Music : Yuvan Shankar Raja 
Editing : Thiyagu 
Stunts Choreography : Anl Arasu 
Art Director : S Kannan
Chief Co-Director : Vijaya Anand 
Costume Designers : Sathya, Pallavi Singh, Jayalakshmi Sundaresan
Lyricist : Madhan Karky

snippet.title: Zack Snyder's Justice League | Official Trailer | HBO Max
snippet.description:
In Zack Snyder's Justice League, determined to ensure Superman’s (Henry Cavill) ultimate sacrifice was not in vain, Bruce Wayne (Ben Affleck) aligns forces with Diana Prince (Gal Gadot) with plans to recruit a team of metahumans to protect the world from an approaching threat of catastrophic proportions. The task proves more difficult than Bruce imagined, as each of the recruits must face the demons of their own pasts to transcend that which has held them back, allowing them to come together, finally forming an unprecedented league of heroes. Now united, Batman (Affleck), Wonder Woman (Gadot), Aquaman (Jason Momoa), Cyborg (Ray Fisher), and The Flash (Ezra Miller) may be too late to save the planet from Steppenwolf, DeSaad, and Darkseid and their dreadful intentions.

Subscribe: http://bit.ly/HBOMaxYouTube
